title: CREATE FOLDER
body: Create a folder structure FIRST. Match your physical hierarchy. Enterprise → Site → Area → Line → Equipment.
code:
[default]
  └ Plant
      ├ Utilities
      │   ├ Boiler
      │   └ CoolingTower
      ├ Production
      │   ├ Line1
      │   └ Line2
      ├ Packaging
      └ QualityLab

ISA-95: Enterprise → Site → Area
        → WorkCenter → Equipment
key: Folder structure = tag path = OPC ref
mistakes: Flat list, no folders (unmanageable at 500+ tags)
Renaming folders after building views (breaks bindings)
